  kiss

           if you can get away for a night ,,you could fly miami isalnd miami

  ----- Original Message ----

Sent: Wednesday, December 27, 2006 1:58:14 PM
Subject: Ответ: Re: Ответ: Re: Ответ: Re: ╬БруБ: Re: otkritka

I ll fly Miami - LA  and LA
 -Moscow...... (((((((((((((((((((((((((((((((( i'm sad

"J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com> пишет:       through new york?? i could do the 8 0r 9 in new york

From: Ekaterina Mitr <ekaterina_mitr@yahoo.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, December 27, 2006 12:23:13 PM
Subject: Ответ: Re: Ответ: Re: ╬БруБ: Re: otkritka

  NY from 28th till jan 2nd...Miami from 2-till 9th...
  What do you mean how i return? by plane :)

      what dates and how to you return

  ----- Original Message ----

To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>

  kiss
  

"J. Epstein"
 <jeeproject@yahoo.com> пишет:
      i'm on the island.. can you come?

  missing you

      when can you visit?

  ----- Original Message ----
